Description:
Extends MudBreadcrumb to automatically listen to route changes and update the breadcrumbs to a label and optional route.
Remarks: Should be placed in MainLayout or similar

Parameters.Name: HomeText
Parameters.Description:
The text to display for the home link ( or "/" ).
Remarks: Defaults to "Home".

Parameters.Name: Separator
Parameters.Description: Specifies the separator between the items.

Parameters.Name: SeparatorTemplate
Parameters.Description: Specifies a RenderFragment to use as the separator.

Parameters.Name: ItemTemplate
Parameters.Description: Specifies a RenderFragment to use as the items' contents.

Parameters.Name: MaxItems
Parameters.Description: Controls when (and if) the breadcrumbs will automatically collapse.

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description: User class names, separated by space.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description: User styles, applied on top of the component's own classes and styles.

Parameters.Name: Tag
Parameters.Description: Use Tag to attach any user data object to the component for your convenience.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description: UserAttributes carries all attributes you add to the component that don't match any of its parameters. They will be splatted onto the underlying HTML tag.

PublicProperties.Name: Items
PublicProperties.Description: Read-only list of BreadcrumbItems, hidden from Parameters
